hero.description: Hues is an AI-powered ERP that streamlines operations, ensures compliance, and enables smarter business decisions.Now in Exclusive Beta — experience the future of enterprise management for free.

whyChoose.subtitle: Experience the power of AI-driven ERP that adapts to your business needs

verifiedOnboarding.title: Verified Onboarding
verifiedOnboarding.description: Aadhaar and PAN-based KYC with live compliance checks.

alwaysAuditReady.title: Always Audit-Ready
alwaysAuditReady.description: MCA/GSTN trails, digital signatures, and tamper-proof logs — out of the box.

aiAtEveryStep.title: AI at Every Step
aiAtEveryStep.description: Auto-convert invoices, populate SKUs, detect fraud, and automate reconciliation.

smartAccessEngine.title: Smart Access Engine
smartAccessEngine.description: Unified RBAC + ABAC. Every access is scoped and logged.

policyDrivenControls.title: Policy-driven controls
policyDrivenControls.description: Retention, visibility, and permissions enforced by rules.

zeroTrust.title: Zero-trust by default
zeroTrust.description: Data never moves without explicit, verifiable consent.

onePlatform.subtitle: Comprehensive business management tools powered by AI

salesPurchaseAutomation.title: Sales & Purchase Automation

builtInBiTools.title: Built-in BI Tools
builtInBiTools.description: Live dashboards for sales, cash flow, and trial balance.
